narration: Here's what science actually says about iodine and your thyroid.
visual_description: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about iodine and your thyroid.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about iodine and your thyroid.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about iodine and your thyroid.

narration: Iodine is essential for thyroid hormone production, vital for metabolism and energy regulation.
visual_description: Context visual: Iodine is essential for thyroid hormone production, vital for metabolism and energy regulation.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Iodine is essential for thyroid hormone production, vital for metabolism and energy regulation.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Iodine is essential for thyroid hormone production, vital for metabolism and energy regulation.

narration: Yet, too much or too little can lead to serious health issues. Ever wonder why?
visual_description: Escalation visual: Yet, too much or too little can lead to serious health issues. Ever wonder why?
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Yet, too much or too little can lead to serious health issues. Ever wonder why?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Yet, too much or too little can lead to serious health issues. Ever wonder why?

narration: Research shows iodine deficiency can cause goiter and hypothyroidism.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Research shows iodine deficiency can cause goiter and hypothyroidism.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Research shows iodine deficiency can cause goiter and hypothyroidism.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Research shows iodine deficiency can cause goiter and hypothyroidism.

narration: But don’t be misled by supplements; excess iodine can also disrupt thyroid function!
visual_description: Pattern Interrupt visual: But don’t be misled by supplements; excess iodine can also disrupt thyroid function!
ai_image_prompt: Pattern Interrupt visual: But don’t be misled by supplements; excess iodine can also disrupt thyroid function!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Pattern Interrupt visual: But don’t be misled by supplements; excess iodine can also disrupt thyroid function!

narration: Balance is key. Regular check-ups ensure your levels are just right.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Balance is key. Regular check-ups ensure your levels are just right.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Balance is key. Regular check-ups ensure your levels are just right.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: Balance is key. Regular check-ups ensure your levels are just right.
